statement: In every magma, Equation 2918 (`x = ((y * (x * y)) * z) * w`) implies Equation 1911 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (y * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0001
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x y)) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op y w))
